claim: Hermes Agent has self-improving capabilities where it learns from task execution and automatically updates its own skills based on what worked and what didn't
actionable: Give Hermes Agent repeated similar tasks and inspect its skills library to observe how its approach evolves automatically
source_title: Hermes Agent is the greatest AI tool ever made. Here's how to set it up

claim: Hermes Agent can schedule autonomous cron jobs (recurring tasks) that run at specific times without user intervention, enabling proactive work completion
actionable: Use plain English prompts to create cron jobs in Hermes Agent for routine tasks like daily summaries or nightly report generation
source_title: Hermes Agent is the greatest AI tool ever made. Here's how to set it up

claim: The Hermes Kanban board automatically splits triage tasks into subtasks and assigns them to different sub-agents for parallel execution
actionable: Dump 5-6 tasks into triage column each morning and return after breakfast to find tasks in progress or completed
source_title: Hermes Agent is the greatest AI tool ever made. Here's how to set it up

claim: Hermes stores all memories and skills in markdown files on local computer rather than in the cloud, giving users full auditability of what the agent knows
actionable: Access Hermes local markdown files to review and edit agent memories and learned skills directly
source_title: Hermes Agent is the greatest AI tool ever made. Here's how to set it up

claim: For agent reliability, use Claude API (Anthropic) over ChatGPT API for best task execution quality, though ChatGPT 5.5 is now usable as a cheaper alternative
actionable: Configure Hermes with Claude API for critical tasks, or ChatGPT 5.5 for cost savings when quality trade-offs are acceptable
source_title: Hermes Agent is the greatest AI tool ever made. Here's how to set it up

claim: Telegram is the best messaging platform for communicating with AI agents because it's actively building AI-agent-friendly features and allows agents to talk to each other
actionable: Configure Hermes Agent to use Telegram as the primary communication interface for accessing the agent
source_title: Hermes Agent is the greatest AI tool ever made. Here's how to set it up

claim: Hermes can serve as a computer administrator that moves files across all devices on a Tailscale private network without the user being physically present
actionable: Set up Tailscale on all devices and instruct Hermes to retrieve files from any device and transfer them to another device via natural language commands
source_title: Hermes Agent is the greatest AI tool ever made. Here's how to set it up

claim: Hermes has complete session recall capabilities that store every conversation in logs, allowing users to ask the agent to recall specific conversations from weeks or months ago
actionable: Query Hermes for historical conversations using date/time references to retrieve past discussion contexts and decisions
source_title: Hermes Agent is the greatest AI tool ever made. Here's how to set it up

claim: OpenClaw has become unreliable with each update breaking the system, making Hermes Agent a more stable choice despite both being similar tools
actionable: If using OpenClaw, maintain a working version before updating and have rollback procedures ready; consider switching to Hermes for stability
source_title: Hermes Agent is the greatest AI tool ever made. Here's how to set it up

claim: Security concerns with AI agents like Hermes are vastly overrated; the agent only performs actions explicitly instructed and will not autonomously leak data or cause harm beyond what the user asks
actionable: Use good judgment in prompts but don't feel the need to create isolated accounts or VPS setups for running Hermes Agent
source_title: Hermes Agent is the greatest AI tool ever made. Here's how to set it up
